title: Word Formation: Staying Fit and Well

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: Maintaining good health requires considerable dedication and 1.1. _________ (1.1) of the choices we make every day. Poor 1.2. _________ (1.2) and physical 1.3. _________ (1.3) are the leading causes of 1.4. _________ (1.4), which has become an epidemic in many developed countries. Sleep 1.5. _________ (1.5) weakens the immune system and lowers the body's 1.6. _________ (1.6) to infections and chronic illnesses. Early 1.7. _________ (1.7) of medical conditions significantly improves treatment outcomes. After serious injuries, patients undergo intensive 1.8. _________ (1.8) programmes that require tremendous willpower and determination to complete successfully.
